-Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/libavutil.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,liblibavutil.so -o /home/runner/work/aX360e/aX360e/app/src/main/cpp/bin/Android-ARM64/Debug/liblibavutil.so
